chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 201 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 03-03-2023 Mr. Mujahid Bhatti, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J.: Mohammad Rizwan has filed this application impugning an order dated 26.03.2020 passed by the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi Central in terms of which an application under section 22-A Cr.P.C. was dismissed. 2. The learned counsel has been unable to satisfy me that there is any infirmity or illegality in the order impugned. It certainly appears that the dispute between the parties is regarding breach of an agreement to sell for which the civil courts are the correct forum to seek relief. 3. Application stands dismissed. JUDGE
